name: 01-fresh-url-with-reviews
description: Bootstrap on a PR that already has two submitted reviews from prior manual back-and-forth. Default cursor is 0, so the watcher will pick up both existing reviews on its first tick. Seeds prs.json + last_seen.json + state.md, then dispatches the first watcher.

gh pr view 142 --repo acme/widget --json.body:
## Goal

Do the thing.

## Acceptance Criteria

- Thing is done.
gh pr view 142 --repo acme/widget --json.title: Do the thing

state_writes.~/.muggle-ai/muggle-do/sessions/acme-wid: single entry: {repo:acme/widget, number:142, url:..., head_sha:abc1230, state:open}
key 'acme/widget#142' with reviewId:0 (default; first tick will dispatch both existing reviews), last_pushed_sha:null, idle_tick_count:0, cycles_completed:0, escalated_review_ids:[], pushed_shas:[]
PR url, slug, loop_user: stan4git, Bootstrapped from URL: yes

side_effects: Print bootstrap success summary (Cursor: 0 — will process 2 existing review(s) on first tick)
expected.notes: Default cursor=0 — first tick will dispatch /muggle-do for both reviews 4295962800 and 4295962850. To skip prior history, pass --forward-only.
